title: Custom code scripts for data analysis in the study "Construction of the axolotl cell landscape using combinatorial hybridization sequencing at single cell resolution"
author: Fang Ye
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Custom scripts for data analysis in the study "Construction of the axolotl cell landscape using combinatorial hybridization sequencing at single cell resolution". 

 Data processing: CHRNAseq_reads_dge_process.r, Preperation_axo.R 

 Gene regulatory network: bigSCale_network_plot.r 

 Clustering: Clustering_axo-META.ipynb, Clustering_axo-NEO.ipynb 

 Gene ontology enrichment AUC plot: GO_AUC_plot.R 

 Single-cell entropy: scEntropy_workflow.R, SLICE.R, hs_km.Rda
steps_raw:
